subject: tieng-anh
topic: Ôn tập giữa học kỳ 2 — Tiếng Anh 7

questions.question: What does 'traffic jam' mean? (Cụm 'traffic jam' nghĩa là gì?)
What is the English word for 'xe máy'? ('xe máy' tiếng Anh là gì?)
What does a red traffic light mean? (Đèn giao thông màu đỏ nghĩa là gì?)
Complete: 'You ___ stop at a red light.' (bắt buộc — điền từ chỉ sự bắt buộc)
Complete: 'We ___ wear a helmet when riding a motorbike.' (phải — điền 'must')
Match the means of transport with its meaning (Nối phương tiện với nghĩa)
Which word is an adjective to describe a film? (Từ nào là tính từ tả một bộ phim?)

statements.text: We must wear a helmet when riding a motorbike.
A comedy is a funny film.

questions.question: What kind of film makes you laugh? It is a ___ film. (phim hài — điền 'comedy')
Which word means a place where two roads cross? (Từ nào chỉ nơi hai con đường cắt nhau?)
Choose the correct sentence (Chọn câu đúng)
options: You must not run a red light.

questions.passage: In big cities, there are often traffic jams in the morning. To stay safe, people must obey the traffic rules. They must stop at red lights and wear helmets when riding motorbikes.
questions.question: When are there often traffic jams? (Khi nào thường có tắc đường?)

questions.passage: In big cities, there are often traffic jams in the morning. To stay safe, people must obey the traffic rules. They must stop at red lights and wear helmets when riding motorbikes.
questions.question: What must people do at red lights? (Người ta phải làm gì khi đèn đỏ?)

questions.passage: In big cities, there are often traffic jams in the morning. To stay safe, people must obey the traffic rules. They must stop at red lights and wear helmets when riding motorbikes.
questions.question: What must people wear when riding motorbikes? (Phải đội gì khi đi xe máy?)
You want to advise a friend to obey the traffic rules (Em muốn khuyên bạn tuân thủ luật giao thông)
options: You should obey the traffic rules.
Rules you should obey traffic is.
